name: Katherine Ryan
bio: Katherine Ryan is a Canadian comedian, writer and presenter based in London known for sharp, glamorous stand-up about celebrity, motherhood and feminism. She won the Funny Women award in 2008 and became a fixture on British panel shows before releasing the Netflix specials In Trouble and Glitter Room. She also created and starred in the Netflix sitcom The Duchess.

timeline.ev: Moves to London and wins the Funny Women award
Releases the Netflix special In Trouble
Releases the Netflix special Glitter Room
Creates and stars in the Netflix sitcom The Duchess
Launches the comedy panel format Backstage with Katherine Ryan

accolades: Two Netflix stand-up specials, In Trouble and Glitter Room
Creator and star of the Netflix sitcom The Duchess

bits.t: The Basic Btches She Grew Up With
